title: SFW Skeletons
description: Skeleton variants that wear the clothing of the default skins
body:
Are you tired of constantly seeing naked skeletons on your screen? Do you ever just want to shield your eyes from their lack of clothing? How can they even survive in the night's cold?

Fear no more, as skeletons now have a chance of wearing clothing sampled from the default skins.

![A crowd of skeletons with varying fashion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vtRdKfy9/images/15c8361573dfd01165eb61abec0eb93f73d8a68d.png)
This resource pack requires Entity Texture Features and Entity Model Features, with support for More Mob Variant's system on the way.
